title: Interference of resonances in  two-proton emission of 16Ne
speaker: 丁晨蓉
paperTitle: Interference of resonances in  two-proton emission of 16Ne
paperAbstract: We investigate the two-proton (2⁢𝑝) emission from  16Ne with the time-dependent  14O +𝑝+𝑝 three-body calculations. Two 0+ resonances are suggested to participate. For the 0^+_1 resonance, the true emission of the spatially localized two protons is dominant, if the single-particle 𝑠1/2 resonance locates above the 2⁢𝑝 energy. By evaluating a time-evolution probability, the 0+ 2 resonance is suggested at ≅3 MeV from the 2⁢𝑝 threshold. The inclusion of 0+ 2 resonance makes the true-2⁢𝑝 emission more dominant in the time-dependent calculations.
